title: Proclamation No. 303, s. 2000
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 303

CREATING AND DESIGNATING A PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED IN FORT BONIFACIO GLOBAL CITY, TAGUIG, METRO MANILA AS A SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE, PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended by Republic Act No. 8748 (An Act Amending Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the “Special Economic Zone Act of 1995”) and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA , President of the Philippines, do hereby create and designate, subject to an actual survey and the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, and Resolution No. 99-357 dated 29 December 1999 of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, an area located in Fort Bonifacio Global City, Taguig, Metro Manila, as a Special Economic Zone to be known as the FORT BONIFACIO-SILICON ALLEY INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY PARK , consisting of TWO HUNDRED FORTY THREE THOUSAND SIX HUNDRED NINETY NINE (243,699.00) SQUARE METERS , more or less, as defined by the following technical descriptions:
